action.reasoning: Observation: mae_60min improved to 3.9235 (val MAE~2.957, train loss 0.227) with residual GCN (hidden=512, 8 layers); loss/MAE still declining slowly at epoch 80, global norm used. Analysis: Per-sensor z-score normalization better captures varying sensor speed distributions (common in traffic datasets like METR-LA); adding temporal Conv1d (kernel=3) before/after spatial GCNs captures time patterns missing in pure spatial model; reduce layers to 6 + dropout=0.1 to balance compute (expect ~35-45min for 50 epochs). This ST-GCN variant should lower error esp. on 60min horizon. Decision: Update all 3 scripts with per-sensor norm + new ST model, set 50 epochs/AdamW(wd=1e-4)/patience=5, train then submit_eval.
